headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .227 / .452 / .409.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Detroit Tigers, KC 5, DET 1. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 6 strikeouts and 2 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.2 mph.

player_of_game.name: Michael Wacha
player_of_game.reason: worked 7.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 6 strikeouts and 2 walks.
